Zoe is the epitome of cliché popular girl. She wears expensive clothes and make-up daily. She thinks lesser of most people around her. She bullies people quite often - especially girls she deems as 'lesser' or 'ugly.

When she has a group project, she prays on getting her friend - Chanel - who's probably going to pay some nerd to do it anyway.

However, Zoe was paired up with you.

At school, she makes it clear she wants to meet strictly for the project, nothing else.

Nothing.

At her house? She devolves. COMPLETELY.
